name: generate_vcd_ports
short_description: Generate VCD ports for the instance
full_help:
generate_vcd_ports

Description: 
Generate VCD ports for the instance

Syntax: 
generate_vcd_ports  [-quiet] [-verbose] <scope>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <scope>     Instance scope hierarchy

Categories: 
ToolLaunch, Simulation

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
